where.if: AND ( LOWER(el.recipient_email) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(el.recipient_name, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(el.subject) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(et.name, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(et.code, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND el.created_at < CAST(#{toDate} AS date) + INTERVAL '1 day'

mapper.select:
SELECT el.email_log_seq ,el.template_seq ,et.code AS template_code ,et.name AS template_name ,el.recipient_email ,el.recipient_name ,el.subject ,el.status ,el.error_message ,el.retry_count ,el.sent_at ,el.opened_at ,el.created_at FROM event.email_logs el LEFT JOIN event.email_templates et ON et.template_seq = el.template_seq
ORDER BY el.created_at DESC, el.email_log_seq DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT el.email_log_seq ,el.template_seq ,et.code AS template_code ,et.name AS template_name ,el.recipient_email ,el.recipient_name ,el.subject ,el.body_html ,el.status ,el.error_message ,el.retry_count ,el.sent_at ,el.opened_at ,el.created_at FROM event.email_logs el LEFT JOIN event.email_templates et ON et.template_seq = el.template_seq WHERE el.email_log_seq = #{emailLogSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE event.email_logs SET status = 'sent' ,error_message = NULL ,sent_at = NOW() WHERE email_log_seq = #{emailLogSeq}
UPDATE event.email_logs SET status = 'sent' ,error_message = NULL ,retry_count = COALESCE(retry_count, 0) + 1 ,sent_at = NOW() WHERE email_log_seq = #{emailLogSeq}
